global.description: The ad features a light green background with product visuals and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock offers for ZenDrop products.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center element
elements.description: A central graphic element with a light green background and three rectangular shapes resembling product packaging.

elements.label: Center element
elements.description: A central graphic element with a light green background and two circular shapes resembling product buttons.

elements.label: Center element
elements.description: A central graphic element with a light green background and three rectangular shapes resembling product packaging.

elements.label: Bottom element
elements.description: A small rectangular element at the bottom with a light green background.

elements.label: Bottom element
elements.description: A small circular element at the bottom with a light green background.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text in bold, white font stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' on a light green background.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' in a bold, dark font positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer' in bold, white font on a dark background.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€9.99' in a bold, dark font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in bold, white font on a yellow background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, promoting limited stock offers.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main product visuals are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
